dataset: crypto-ohlcv-1d membership schedule (Alpaca spot, USD quote)
conservative_interpolation_rule: A pair counts as listed on day T ONLY if T lies inside a maximal run of consecutive evidentiary ledger points (support-page snapshots S1-S16 plus the assets-API pull A) that ALL contain the pair; runs are closed at the capture dates of their first and last containing points (open-ended when the run reaches A and the pair is active). A dated data-API event bound may only TIGHTEN an interval (e.g. MKR's end = min(last containing snapshot, data-API delisting bound)); data presence never extends listing. Delist/list dates falling in inter-snapshot dark windows are therefore conservatively truncated to the bracketing containing captures; the residual (a pair may truly have been listed earlier/later inside a dark window) is a registered omission.

trading_launch_floor.note: Alpaca crypto trading went live 2021-11-22; the S1 capture predates order placement, so the 2021 four are floored here despite earlier 'supported' language.

snapshot_ledger.note: By this capture the support article no longer carries a supported-asset list; non-evidentiary for membership (chain neither extends nor breaks here).

registered_omission.reason: Alpaca's crypto data API no longer serves any WBTC/USD history (purged after delisting); listed in-window per S3-S6 but unobtainable — enumerated censoring per prereg section 3(b), bias direction: inflates PASS (a delisting-bound coin absent from the store cannot be picked as a bottom-3 loser).

registered_omissions_summary.wbtc_purged: WBTC/USD listed 2022-04-25..2023-01-29 (conservative) but its history is purged from the data API — permanent, unobtainable; inflates PASS.
registered_omissions_summary.dark_windows: Membership between snapshot captures is interpolated only when both bracketing captures contain the pair. True list/delist dates inside gaps (notably the ~2022-11 delisting wave for DOGE/SUSHI/YFI/AVAX between S5 and S6, the 2023 mid-year delistings of ALGO/MATIC/NEAR/TRX/DAI/PAXG/SOL/WBTC between S6 and S7, and the 2024-2025 relists between S9/S12 and their first containing captures) are unknown; the schedule undercounts listing there by construction. Pairs first evidenced only by the assets-API pull (ADA/ARB/BONK/FIL/HYPE/LDO/ONDO/POL/RENDER/WIF, and PAXG's relist) carry single-evidence-point intervals at 2026-07-17.
